components.name: blackhole
components.description: Render a physically convincing 3D black hole with orbiting particles, depth-sorted occlusion, gravity inflow, and a glowing event-horizon core.

components.name: juiceeffect
components.description: Fill an image silhouette with gooey, rising-and-falling liquid particles that fuse into organic blobs and scatter from the cursor.

components.name: spiralimages
components.description: Images flow along an Archimedean spiral vortex from the edge into the center, rotating to follow the tangent and fading at both ends.

components.name: svgparticles
components.description: Transform images/SVGs into interactive particle animations with hover and repulsion effects.

components.name: fluidtrail
components.description: Paint a glowing, GPU-simulated fluid trail that swirls and drifts behind the cursor with real Navier-Stokes physics.

components.name: weight-hover
components.description: Morph each letter's variable-font weight on hover, staggered letter-by-letter with a spring that eases in and out.

components.name: smokytext
components.description: Animate text with realistic smoke diffusion, customizable reveal directions, trigger modes, and smooth character-based transitions.

components.name: infinitegallery
components.description: An infinitely zoomable and draggable image gallery with smooth motion, momentum, and immersive navigation.

components.name: pixelreveal
components.description: Dissolve a grid of colored pixel squares to reveal an image, sweeping up, down, left, or right with a ragged, noisy leading edge.

components.name: inkbleed
components.description: Create interactive ink bleed effects that react fluidly to cursor movement.

components.name: glitterwrap
components.description: Send a glittering starfield of particles warping outward or inward from center, with random sparkle flashes and motion streaks.

components.name: risinglines
components.description: Emit two layers of glowing particles — thin line sparks and soft blobs — rising or falling from a luminous horizon on canvas.

components.name: particlesphere
components.description: Spin an interactive 3D sphere of thousands of glowing particles that scatter away from your cursor and clicks.

components.name: pixelcard
components.description: Fill a card with a shimmering canvas grid of pixels that grow in from the center or any edge on hover, scroll, or automatically.

components.name: kineticgrid
components.description: An interactive grid background that dynamically reacts to cursor movement with smooth attraction, animated mesh lines, and an optional cursor trail.

components.name: typewriter
components.description: Types out a rotating list of phrases one character at a time with a blinking cursor and a static, separately colored prefix.

components.name: random-letter-swap
components.description: Swap each letter of a heading vertically on hover, revealing a duplicate glyph in a randomized, staggered order.

components.name: spinimage
components.description: Orbit a set of images along a tilted 3D ellipse with continuous spin, depth-based scaling, and front-to-back layering.

components.name: textmorph
components.description: Cycle through a word list with a gooey blur-and-scale morph that melts each word smoothly into the next.

components.name: draggable-grid
components.description: An infinitely draggable image canvas with smooth momentum, responsive layouts, and seamless gallery exploration.

components.name: usercursor
components.description: Replace the native pointer inside any surface with a spring-tracked arrow and a trailing name pill that rocks with cursor speed.

components.name: boxcarousel
components.description: Rotate images and videos across the four faces of a 3D cube, driven by autoplay, drag, or arrow keys.

components.name: pixeldrift
components.description: Interactive particle typography that assembles, disperses, and reacts to cursor movement with smooth physics-based animations.

components.name: spotlighttext
components.description: Dim a block of text and sweep a soft cursor-following spotlight across it to reveal the bright letters underneath on hover.

components.name: coverflowgallery
components.description: A smooth 3D coverflow carousel with perspective animations, autoplay, and fully customizable titles.

components.name: coverflowcarousel
components.description: Glide through an infinite cover-flow reel where the centered image grows into a landscape hero while its neighbors fold into thin slats.

components.name: swipe-stack
components.description: Flick through a fanned 3D stack of image cards that tilt, scale, and cycle to the back on every swipe.

components.name: scrambletext
components.description: Animate text with cinematic glitch reveals and interactive character-based hover effects.

components.name: emojiburst
components.description: Launch a burst of custom emojis from a tappable button, flying off freely under gravity with a springy shake on each press.

components.name: snowfall
components.description: Fill any frame with drifting canvas snow, tuning per-flake size, speed, opacity, wind sway, and fall direction.

components.name: sticker-peel
components.description: Peel and curl a 3D image sticker away from the surface on hover and press, with realistic bone-driven folding and soft shadows.

components.name: blinkingsquares
components.description: Fill any background with a grid of independently twinkling squares, shaped by a directional density fade and a cursor-following halo.

components.name: directionhover
components.description: Swap text to an accent-colored copy that slides in from the top or bottom edge the cursor enters, then out again on leave.

components.name: draggablesticker
components.description: Drag an image around like a real sticker that peels off the surface, tilts to your motion, and settles back into place.

components.name: starburst
components.description: Radiate glowing streaks outward from a movable focal point to form a twinkling starburst with a soft flower bloom at its core.

components.name: imagegallery
components.description: Continuously stream images that fly outward or spiral from the center, with configurable density, easing, and timing.

components.name: meshtexthover
components.description: Warp text across a WebGL mesh that drags and springs back under the cursor, with chromatic color-split fringes that cycle through your palette.

components.name: character-waves
components.description: Fill any background with a flowing field of ASCII characters driven by layered noise waves that ripple away from the cursor.

components.name: gravitygallery
components.description: Drop image-filled squares or circles into a Matter.js physics world with gravity, walls, and click-drag tossing.

components.name: blurcarousel
components.description: Flip through images with a soft blur that creeps in on arrow hover and a 3D press-tilt that springs back as each slide advances.

components.name: dynamic-weight
components.description: Morph each letter between two font weights based on its distance from the cursor for a live, variable-font hover effect.

components.name: flickertext
components.description: Bring text and images to life with customizable flicker and outline effects.

components.name: link-preview
components.description: Reveal a floating thumbnail of any linked page on hover, with the preview leaning toward your cursor as it moves.

components.name: magneticcarousel
components.description: Magnify a row of image bars macOS dock style as the cursor nears, then click any bar to expand it into a large square.

components.name: particletunnel
components.description: Flow particles along radial spokes toward a central black void with perspective depth, depth-based fading, and z-sorted overlap.

components.name: shiny-pill
components.description: Sweep a bright sheen across a line of text on an endless loop, with tunable shine color and sweep speed.

components.name: pixelate-image
components.description: Reveal or conceal an image through a real-time SVG pixelation filter driven by cursor distance or a scroll-triggered tween.

components.name: proximityorbit
components.description: Display images in a smooth, interactive circular orbit.

components.name: textpath
components.description: Scroll repeating text seamlessly along a procedural sine-wave path with adjustable frequency, height, speed, and direction.

components.name: textlift
components.description: Stack each letter into a layered 3D extrusion that expands and lifts off the surface when you hover it individually.
